description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow set within a large, fenced property featuring a tennis court, landscaped gardens, and multiple outdoor amenities. The main building is characterized by clean, geometric lines, flat roofs, and large windows, with a rooftop terrace and solar panels visible. The grounds include a detached water tank, a patio area with seating, and a small outbuilding or shed. The property is surrounded by manicured lawns, decorative shrubs, and a paved entrance with steps leading to the front door. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and contemporary architectural elements. The bungalow appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden and plastic elements in the outdoor furnishings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, rooftop terrace, and extensive landscaped grounds including a tennis court and patio. The property is enclosed by a fence and features contemporary design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, rooftop terrace, tennis court in the foreground, and landscaped garden with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, rear patio area, water tank, and the geometric structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, decorative shrubs, water tank, and the angular rear facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the main entrance, palm trees, and a clear view of the tennis court and side garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
